products.name: Wind Down Tea
products.shortDescription: Chamomile and lavender loose-leaf with clean-dissolving CBD.
products.description: A floral evening steep designed for slower breathing and a gentler handoff into night. Many customers use this as their first ritual marker after work.
products.howToUse: Steep 1 tablespoon for 5-7 minutes. Add honey if you like a warmer finish.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Wind Down Tea tin with loose leaves and chamomile blossoms

products.name: Two-Way Candle
products.shortDescription: Low-melt soy candle that doubles as warm massage oil.
products.description: Burn for 15-20 minutes and blow it out. The pooled wax stays skin-safe and smooth for shoulder or hand massage.
products.howToUse: Burn until a wax pool forms, extinguish, then apply a small amount to skin.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Two-Way Candle in amber glass with cedar notes

products.name: Roll-On Balm
products.shortDescription: Pocket roll-on for neck and wrist in seconds.
products.description: The quickest ritual in the line. Keep one in your bag and one on your nightstand.
products.howToUse: Apply three passes on wrists, temples, or neck whenever you need to reset.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Roll-On Balm bottle with matte black cap

products.name: Raw CBD Honey
products.shortDescription: Never boiled, fully emulsified honey for tea or toast.
products.description: Gently warmed so cannabinoids stay intact, then emulsified for an even spoon every time.
products.howToUse: Use one teaspoon in tea, yogurt, or straight from the spoon.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Raw CBD Honey jar with wooden dipper

products.name: Evening Ritual Set
products.shortDescription: All four rituals in one gift-ready set.
products.description: The full evening arc in one box: tea, candle, roll-on, and honey.
products.howToUse: Start at any hour and stack rituals as needed.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Evening Ritual Set gift box with four products
